headline: ₹500-2,000 Cr at risk over project cycle if execution or compliance falters. — Adani Power's ₹2 lakh crore capex plan targets 41.87 GW by FY32, signaling sectoral scale-up but limited immediate ESG impact.
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks; non-disclosure could invite SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
No immediate P/E compression; long-term margin impact depends on project execution and fuel mix.
Potential for higher cost of capital if ESG disclosures lag; green financing possible if taxonomy-aligned.
